description.en: Shows what anime you are watching on Asya Animeleri, including anime name, season, episode and elapsed time.
description.tr: Asya Animeleri üzerinde izlediğiniz animeyi, sezon, bölüm ve geçen süreyle birlikte gösterir.

settings.title: Show Episode
settings.description: Shows the season and episode number in the status.

settings.title: Show Elapsed Time
settings.description: Shows how long you have been watching.

settings.title: Show Browsing
settings.description: Shows activity when browsing the site outside of a video.
